name: plantuml-little-wasm-backend-support
description: Private helper package for the deterministic wasm Graphviz backend used by plantuml-little's reference tests. Not published. The graphviz-anywhere-web dep is pinned to an exact version because reference SVGs are byte-exact against that wasm build (see tests/reference/VERSION); any drift produces sub-pixel float diffs in Graphviz layout output.
